name: Kingsgate Consolidated Limited.
analysis: It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.8000, stop A$4.5045, target A$6.4800 (0.52:1) — then trail it.
